info.title: Alerty API
info.description: Alerty is a developer monitoring platform. The Alerty API provides endpoints for authentication, organization management, integrations, chat, querying logs/metrics/traces, inventory management, monitoring, and incident management.

302.description: The login request is redirecting to the auth page

get.description: Detects the CDN vendor from the HTTP headers of the given URL.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL to detect the CDN vendor from.

200.description: A list of detected CDN vendors.

400.description: Bad Request. URL parameter is missing or invalid.

500.description: Internal Server Error. An error occurred during the detection process.

200.description: webhook received (does not indicate whether event was processed or not)

model.description: the chat model used for this conversation

hasAction.description: whether one of the blocks in this completion contains an action

slug.description: used to create a resource for a pre-configured status page
